2606.31846.title: Z-1: Efficient Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Language-Action Models
2606.31846.paper_summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising framework for robotic manipulation by connecting language instructions, visual observations, and continuous control. However, most existing policies remain limited by behavior cloning or supervised fine-tuning (SFT) from fixed demonstrations, which provides limited opportunity to improve from the policy's own failures. In this paper, we present Z-1, a reinforcement learning (RL) post-training framework for flow-based VLA models. Built on top of $π_{0.5}$, Z-1 uses only publicly released RoboCasa demonstrations for SFT and then applies a task-wise Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) strategy across $24$ standard RoboCasa tasks. To improve the efficiency and stability of online optimization, Z-1 combines shared-prefix rollout construction, tree-structured trajectory branching, completion-aware reward calibration, and selective joint training of VLM and Action Expert. Across all $24$ RoboCasa tasks, Z-1 achieves an average success rate of $80.6\%$, improving over its SFT initialization by $13.2\%$ points and outperforms the published sota models. These results show that systematic GRPO post-training can substantially improve flow-based VLA policies without additional private demonstrations.
2606.31846.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 模型為機器人操作提供了一個有前景的框架，通過連接語言指令、視覺觀察和連續控制。然而，大多數現有政策仍然受到行為克隆或從固定示範進行的監督微調 (SFT) 的限制，這提供了有限的機會來從政策自身的失敗中改進。在本文中，我們提出了 Z-1，一個基於流的 VLA 模型的強化學習 (RL) 後訓練框架。Z-1 建立在 $π_{0.5}$ 之上，僅使用公開發布的 RoboCasa 示範進行 SFT，然後在 $24$ 個標準 RoboCasa 任務中應用任務級別的群體相對政策優化 (GRPO) 策略。為了提高在線優化的效率和穩定性，Z-1 結合了共享前綴的回合構建、樹狀軌跡分支、完成感知的獎勵校準，以及 VLM 和行動專家的選擇性聯合訓練。在所有 $24$ 個 RoboCasa 任務中，Z-1 的平均成功率達到 $80.6\%$，比其 SFT 初始化提高了 $13.2\%$ 個百分點，並且超越了已發表的 sota 模型。這些結果顯示，系統性的 GRPO 後訓練可以在不需要額外私有示範的情況下，顯著改善基於流的 VLA 政策。
2606.31846.author: Lang Cao et.al.
2606.31846.authors: Lang Cao, Renhong Chen, Luyi Li, Peng Wang, Mofan Peng, Yitong Li
